message:
feat(runtime): task polling budget, wake source tracking, and scope refinements

- Add polls_remaining budget tracking to StoredTask for executor tracing
- Expand WakeSource with Io/Timer/Explicit/Unknown variants and fd tracking
- Add task record poll tracking with attempt/budget metadata
- Scope and actor refinements for region close protocol

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
